verdict.label: Worth checking
verdict.headline: Supertubos After work (16:30 start)
verdict.reason: Supertubos is worth a quick check for after work (16:30 start), but it is not a guaranteed session.  Treat it as a check-first call rather than a sure thing.  The wind should be manageable, but not a big advantage.  The tide is helping, but the spot still looks serious.

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Supertubos looks like a small window for Worth checking, Low confidence: 0.3-0.6 m, 66 kJ, 11 s period, lully 42/100, and wind is not fully clear.  A fast, hollow sand-bottom wave that gets serious quickly; this is best for short, punchy bodyboard barrels when it is small enough for comfort; worth keeping on the radar because Surfline is showing it above Poor while most other local spots are Poor..  Watch: spot surf looks too small; 10-13s at high tide can get too backed up for Supertubos / Molhe Leste.

ranked.explanation: Molhe Leste looks like a clean small window for Too soft, Low confidence: 0-0.3 m, 66 kJ, 11 s period, workable consistency 55/100, and good wind at 25 km/h.  A jetty-shaped beach break with punchy rights and lefts; this is best for sheltered power when Supertubos has too much size.  Watch: spot surf looks too small; 10-13s at high tide can get too backed up for Supertubos / Molhe Leste; Molhe Leste looks below your bodyboard fun size.
ranked.shortExplanation: Molhe Leste is worth a quick check for after work (16:30 start), but it is not a guaranteed session.  It looks too soft to make the drive worthwhile.  The wind should help keep it tidy.  The tide is helping, but the spot still looks serious.
warnings: 10-13s at high tide can get too backed up for Supertubos / Molhe Leste
